workflow.desc: Desktop Code Review - Reviews desktop app implementation against design and security standards

field.name: design_doc_path
field.desc: Path to desktop module design document

field.name: source_root
field.desc: Root directory of desktop source code

block.field: NEVER modify source code files - read-only operation
Do NOT attempt to fix issues - only document them
PARTIAL/FAIL results MUST include specific Re-dispatch Guidance
Skip items already marked as passed in previous review
Verify all required parameters provided
Report error and stop
- Module Overview - Process Architecture - IPC Contracts - Native Integration points
Completed Files, Implementation Status, Known Issues
API contract not provided - skipping API validation

- Main Process: src-tauri/src/**/*.rs or main/**/* (e.g., src-tauri/src/main.rs) - Renderer: src/**/* (frontend files, e.g., src/App.vue) - Preload: preload/**/* or src-tauri/src/preload.rs - IPC Handlers: src-tauri/src/commands/**/*.rs - Native Modules: native/**/*
Use Glob to scan for implemented files
Generate completeness matrix and percentage

- Main/Renderer Separation: Business logic in main process only - Severity: CRITICAL - No Node in Renderer: Renderer has no direct Node.js access - Severity: CRITICAL - Context Isolation: contextIsolation enabled - Severity: CRITICAL

- Channel Naming: IPC channels follow naming convention - Severity: ERROR - Type Safety: IPC payloads properly typed - Severity: ERROR - Channel Registration: All channels registered in preload - Severity: ERROR - Bidirectional Safety: No unsafe IPC patterns - Severity: CRITICAL

- contextBridge: Uses contextBridge for API exposure - Severity: CRITICAL - Preload Script: Preload script properly configured - Severity: CRITICAL - CSP Headers: Content Security Policy configured - Severity: ERROR - Remote Content: No unsafe remote content loading - Severity: CRITICAL

- File System: File operations in main process only - Severity: CRITICAL - System Notifications: Notifications properly implemented - Severity: WARN - Native Menus: Menu structure matches design - Severity: ERROR - System Tray: Tray implementation if required - Severity: ERROR

- Build Config: Build configuration complete - Severity: ERROR - Assets: Required assets included - Severity: ERROR - Signing: Code signing configured (if required) - Severity: WARN - Auto-Update: Auto-update mechanism (if required) - Severity: WARN
- PASS: 100% files created, 0 ERROR-level issues - PARTIAL: 70-99% files created, or non-critical ERROR issues - FAIL: <70% files created, or critical blockers present
templates/REVIEW-REPORT-TEMPLATE.md
speccrew-workspace/iterations/{number}-{type}-{name}/04.development/{platform_id}/[module]-review-report.md
